Galaxy is an open source data analysis platform that focuses on reproducible research and supports High-performance computing. You need no programming skills or installations. This introductory tutorial guides you through your first steps in Galaxy and exemplifies, how you can use the platform in the Humanities and Social Sciences. It is the foundation for more advanced tutorials that will helps you analyse your text, media files or images according to your research needs.\\

This resource is constantly updated. Please click below for latest version.

## Learning outcomes:

After completing this training module, learners will be able to:

* Log in to Galaxy
* Run different tools in Galaxy
* Clean and compare two similar texts
